description: Renovate replaces Dependabot: npm, github-actions, Dockerfiles, docker-compose. Disable Dependabot version updates in Settings → Code security and analysis.

packageRules.description: Prioritize security updates and merge safe fixes quickly
Group npm updates into one PR
Group GitHub Actions updates into one PR
Group Dockerfile image updates into one PR
Group docker-compose image updates into one PR
Pin Docker image digests for immutability and supply-chain compliance
